---
title: "CV"
---

```{=html}
<p style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <a href="assets/cv.pdf" class="about-link" download>
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
  </a>
</p>

<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Institut d'Études Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po), Paris, France</span>
    <span class="cv-date">August 2023 – June 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Master of Research in Economics</div>
  <div class="cv-detail">GPA: 4.0/4.0</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Bard College, Annandale-on-Hudson, United States</span>
    <span class="cv-date">August 2019 – May 2023</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Bachelor of Arts in Economics</div>
  <div class="cv-detail">GPA: 3.8/4.0</div>
  <div class="cv-detail">Awards: Levy Economics Institute Prize (2023); OSUN Certificate in Public Policy and Economic Analysis (2023); Amicus Foundation Scholarship (2021)</div>
</div>

<hr/>
<h2>Experience</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Penn Wharton Budget Model, Philadelphia, United States</span>
    <span class="cv-date">June 2026 – Present</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Analyst</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Department of Economics, Trinity College Dublin, Dublin, Ireland</span>
    <span class="cv-date">September 2025 – May 2026</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Predoctoral Research Assistant</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">The Economic Journal, Royal Economic Society, Paris, France</span>
    <span class="cv-date">August 2024 – June 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Replicator</div>
</div>

<hr/>
<h2>Internships</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Kiel Institute for the World Economy</span>
    <span class="cv-date">July 2024 – September 2024</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Research Intern</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Ceres, Inc.</span>
    <span class="cv-date">June 2023 – August 2023</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Financial Regulation Intern</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Mekong Strategic Group, Phnom Penh, Cambodia</span>
    <span class="cv-date">June 2022 – August 2022</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Analytics Intern</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">OSUN – Economic Democracy Initiative</span>
    <span class="cv-date">June 2021 – August 2021</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Student Fellow</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Office of Illinois State Senator Heather Steans, Chicago, United States</span>
    <span class="cv-date">June 2020 – August 2020</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Summer Intern</div>
</div>

<hr/>
<h2>Skills</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-detail"><strong>Technical:</strong> R, STATA, Python, Julia, LaTeX, Salesforce, Microsoft Office, Optical Character Recognition, Census Matching, Panel and Cross-sectional Econometrics, DSGE Modeling</div>
  <div class="cv-detail"><strong>Languages:</strong> English (Native), French (B1), Khmer/Cambodian (Basic Work Proficiency)</div>
</div>

<hr/>
<h2>Leadership &amp; Activities</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">New York Southeast Asia Society</span>
    <span class="cv-date">2021 – Present</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Member</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Young Scholars Initiative</span>
    <span class="cv-date">2019 – Present</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">Student Member</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-header">
    <span class="cv-org">Bard College Economics Club</span>
    <span class="cv-date">2020 – 2022</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-role">President</div>
</div>
```
